Definition: Species name as printed in the source (underscores replaced by spaces)
Substrate-use category scored by Wimberly (arboreal / terrestrial)
Note: substrate is compiled as primary in Granatosky2018

Definition: Mean stance duty factor: percentage of the stride cycle a foot maintains ground contact
Limb phase (diagonality): timing of forelimb footfall as percent of the stride after the ipsilateral hindlimb (Hildebrand)
Symmetrical walking-gait category: DSDC diagonal-sequence diagonal-couplet / LSDC lateral-sequence diagonal-couplet / LSLC lateral-sequence lateral-couplet

Note: already compiled elsewhere; kept for reference

Definition: Log_HL / Log_BM / Log_HL_BM.1.3 / ArcSin_Phase / ArcSin_DF are analysis transforms retained in the snapshot only (re-derivable; not carried to the analysis CSV)
Gait categories follow Hildebrand symmetrical-gait scheme (sequence x couplet)
